facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (10:29 AM ET Mar 31). No new activity since last run (9:12 AM ET). Notification badge dropped from 18 to 16 — 2 notifications were auto-read (Cheryl Provost friend accept + Ann Giroux friend accept). No new comments on Novaro AI group posts visible in notifications. Messenger inbox unchanged: Brady Fellows, Byron Peabody, Anthony Cocchi (3d ago), Ann Giroux (unread E2EE, same as before). Activity log confirms no new Novaro posts today — last posts were March 30 at 11:05–11:41 PM. Car Detailing Business Owners notification was someone else advertising their web design agency in the group (not a lead). Spam tags from Paul Henry Aguirre, Bil Gates, Paul Smith, Superior Commercial Cleaning LLC, Berry Little — all unchanged from prior run. All totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. March 31 daily: 4 posts, 2 comments, 1 positive, 1 DM, 1 interest signal.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (9:38 AM ET Mar 31): 1,039 total connections (unchanged), 182 pending sent requests (unchanged — most recent batch sent 34-43 min before scrape: Jim Black, David Sconza, Justin Walsh, Patrick Winterstein, Aidan Westphalen, Gavin Bilby, Karter Howard, Eli Nash, Jackson Manning, Rex Owen targeting window cleaning and auto detailing owners), 0 new acceptances, 8 outreach messages sent (unchanged), 0 prospect replies, 0 interest signals. Unread filter confirms 'No unread messages' — (2) badge is LinkedIn system/sponsored messages only. 21 incoming invitations on Grow page unchanged. Today's total requests remain 57.
